title: French Lamb Hash
description: A hearty French dish made with lamb, hash, and a hint of american flavors. Perfect for a cure for a hangover.
instructions: In a large skillet, cook the ground lamb over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the pre-cooked hash to the skillet and stir to combine with the lamb.
Add the unsalted butter to the skillet and stir until melted.
Make 4 wells in the lamb and hash mixture and crack an egg into each well.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the eggs are cooked to your desired doneness.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot and enjoy the cure for your hangover!
